# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security vulnerabilities seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please **do not** create a public GitHub issue.

### How to Report Safely

1. **Email us directly** - Contact the maintainer at: tytusstevenson5@gmail.com
2. **Include details:**
   - Description of the vulnerability
   - Steps to reproduce (if applicable)
   - Potential impact
   - Suggested fix (if you have one)

3. **Allow time for response** - We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and work on a fix

### What Happens Next

- We will investigate the vulnerability
- We will keep you informed of our progress
- We will credit you in a security advisory (if you wish)
- We will release a patched version as soon as possible

## Security Best Practices

When using this application, please:
- Keep your dependencies updated
- Use environment variables for sensitive data (never commit `.env` files)
- Report any suspicious activity
- Follow the guidelines in our CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md

## Supported Versions

We support security updates for the latest release. Older versions may not receive security patches.

Thank you for helping keep this project secure! 🔒
